title: frontend: Fixes verific import around range order

features.name: packed array with expression-based descending range
features.description: Code should include a packed array declaration using a descending range with expression, like [0:N-1] where N is a constant expression
features.snippet:
input wire [0:4-1] in;
output wire [0:4-1] out

features.name: module instantiation with differing range orderings in ports
features.description: Code should include module instantiation where the parent module's port ranges have opposite ordering from the child module's port ranges

features.name: signal assignment between opposite range order signals
features.description: Code should include an assignment from a signal with descending range [N:0] to one with ascending range [0:N] or vice versa
